cache_policy: Cache only representations keyed by source image hash, approved resolution-policy identity, MINDTCT executable hash, release, and parameter identity; disabled until prerequisites resolve.
compare_operations: official BOZORTH3 1:1 invocation with one probe XYT and one gallery XYT
parse exactly one base-10 integer score line

failure_semantics.compare_failure: Nonzero BOZORTH3 exit, missing output, extra output, or non-integer output is a technical failure and has no score.
failure_semantics.prepare_failure: Nonzero MINDTCT exit, missing XYT output, malformed output, or rejected input is a technical failure.
failure_semantics.valid_zero_score: BOZORTH3 score zero is a valid raw score, including the documented fewer-than-ten-minutiae case, and is not itself a technical failure.

prepare_operations: apply only the separately approved resolution policy for the declared nominal PPI
run official unmodified MINDTCT without optional contrast boost
representation_cleanup: Delete all temporary MINDTCT outputs after comparison or cache publication; never track them in Git.
representation_format: MINDTCT XYT text: integer x, y, theta, and quality columns; BOZORTH3 consumes the first three and accepts the fourth.
score_semantics: nonnegative integer raw BOZORTH3 match score

success_semantics.compare: BOZORTH3 exits zero and stdout is exactly one base-10 integer line.
success_semantics.prepare: MINDTCT exits zero and emits the expected XYT representation, which may be empty when no minutiae are found.

temporary_file_policy: Use a fresh private directory per prepare operation, pass no user-controlled output root, and clean it after the representation lifecycle ends.
